tagline: Quantify every trade with probability math

steps.description: Enter the current asset price to anchor the calculation
Set position size to scale the expected value output
Scroll down to reveal the price target and probability distribution section

steps.selector: button.add-target, button[onclick*='addTarget'], button:contains('添加价格目标')
steps.description: Add an additional price target to build a multi-scenario probability distribution
Calculate the expected value across all defined scenarios instantly
